proves: Buyer-validation acceptance thresholds and release holds are explicit.
Target slate, discovery scripts, and capture fields are ready for owner-approved outreach.
Research/template/not-contacted rows are excluded from buyer proof.
does_not_prove: LOI, paid-pilot, procurement-path, or referenceable buyer evidence.
Hosted operational proof, enterprise-security proof, or prediction-accuracy proof.

current_source_alignment.alignment: First customers require direct customer understanding, manual work, and real usage signals before scaling.
Enterprise AI pilots must address desired business outcomes, data quality, skepticism, and adoption resistance.
Procurement-facing AI claims need explicit security, accuracy, and ethics evidence before broader automation or buying-system trust.
Geopolitical risk is a live buyer concern, but concern must be converted into named workflow pain and willingness-to-pay proof.
CFO concern supports the wedge around monitoring and scenario planning, but does not replace buyer discovery.

acceptance_gates.required_evidence: At least 10 source-backed targets and one buyer-safe pilot offer packet.
acceptance_gates.allowed_claim: A source-backed target slate and pilot offer are ready for owner-approved discovery.
acceptance_gates.prohibited_claim: Buyer validation or willingness to pay has been proven.

acceptance_gates.required_evidence: CRM/call-sheet fields include role, proof shown, objection, next action, willingness-to-pay signal, pilot outcome capture, security/procurement blocker, accuracy blocker, and evidence quality.
acceptance_gates.allowed_claim: Buyer evidence capture is operationally ready.
acceptance_gates.prohibited_claim: Research rows, templates, or not-contacted rows are buyer evidence.

acceptance_gates.required_evidence: CRM and call-sheet rows pass schema, status, signal, completed-call, evidence-quality, and claim-boundary validation.
acceptance_gates.allowed_claim: Buyer evidence input rows are ready for buyer proof-gate review.
acceptance_gates.prohibited_claim: Unvalidated buyer rows prove market pull.

acceptance_gates.required_evidence: 10 completed discovery calls with required fields filled.
acceptance_gates.allowed_claim: The completed call loop has been run on the named sample.
acceptance_gates.prohibited_claim: Desk research is enough to validate market pull.

acceptance_gates.required_evidence: 3 qualified follow-ups with buyer role, proof shown, objection, and next action.
acceptance_gates.allowed_claim: Multiple prospects requested credible next steps.
acceptance_gates.prohibited_claim: Generic interest or curiosity-only replies prove demand.

acceptance_gates.allowed_claim: At least one commitment path exists and can be reviewed.
acceptance_gates.prohibited_claim: Willingness to pay is proven without a commitment-path signal.

acceptance_gates.required_evidence: Completed calls produce repeated objection patterns and a decision to keep, narrow, or change the top niche offer.
acceptance_gates.allowed_claim: Buyer feedback has informed the next positioning decision.
acceptance_gates.prohibited_claim: A static offer packet is buyer-informed without recorded objections.

acceptance_gates.required_evidence: Owner-approved external-shareable references, redacted buyer evidence, and buyer-safe claim language.
acceptance_gates.allowed_claim: No external buyer reference claim is currently allowed.
acceptance_gates.prohibited_claim: Named buyer traction, referenceability, or public-sector validation.

release_holds.evidence_needed: Buyer CRM/call-sheet input validation passes with completed calls, qualified follow-ups, commitment-path signals, and claim-boundary checks.
10 completed calls with required buyer-evidence fields.
10 completed calls with baseline/current-workflow value, pilot outcome or expected delta, quality signal, buyer decision event, and outcome evidence notes.
Recorded objections and no-fit reasons from completed calls.
Owner-approved redacted buyer evidence and external-shareable claim language.

required_owner_inputs: Approve or edit the 10-target discovery slate before any outreach.
Approve the pilot offer language and no-world-class-prediction boundary.
Run or authorize discovery calls; store real outcomes or redacted identifiers.
Mark each buyer signal as none, curiosity-only, qualified follow-up, paid-pilot discussion, LOI discussion, or procurement path.
Approve what buyer evidence can be shared externally.
next_commands_after_buyer_data: Fill docs/launch-readiness/buyer-validation-crm-template-2026-06-06.csv with completed buyer outcomes or redacted identifiers.
